folio.label: 191v
folio.l: By swiche ensamples olde , maist æè leere
That noman shulde be to rechelees
Of dreemes , for I sey the doutelees
That many a dreeme , ful sore is for to drede
¢ Loo in the lyf of Seynt kenhelm , I rede
That was kenulphus sone , the noble kyngö
Of Mertenrike , how kenelm mette a thy~ngö
A lite or he was mordred , on the day
His mordre , in his auysiou~ he say
His Norice , úi~ expouned euäydel
His sweuene , & bad úi~ for to kepe úi~ wel
Fro tresoun , but he nas but seuene ©er old
And æäfore , litel tale hatú he told
Of any dreem , so holy was his herte
By god I hadde leuere , than my sherte
That ©e had red his legende , as haue I
¢ Dame Partelote , I seye ©ow trewely
Macrobeus , that wryt the auysioun
In Affrike of the worthy Cipioun
Affermetú dreemes , & seitú æ they ben
Warnynge of thynges , that men after sen
¢ And foræämore , I preye ©ow loketú wel
In the olde testament , of Danyel
If he helde dreemes , any vanytee
¢ Rede eke of Ioseph , & æäe shuln ©e see
Where dreemes ben somtyme , I seye nat alle
Warnyngö of thynges , æ shuln after falle
Loke of Egipte , the kyng Daun pharaoo
His Bakere , and his Boteler also
Wher they ne felt , noon effecte in dreemes
Who so wol seke actes , of sondry Remes
May rede of Dreemes , many a wondir thyngö
Lo Cresus , whicú æ was , of lyde kyngö
Mette he nat , that he sat vp oon a tree
Whicú signyfied , he shulde an hanged be
¢ Lo heere Andremacha , Ectoris wyf

note.notetxt: 321 There is a small cross in the left margin. RJ

folio.l: That day æ Ector , shulde lese his lif
She dreemed , on the same nygút byforn~
How æ the lyf of Ector , shulde be lorn~
If thilke day he went , in to bataille
She warned úi~ , but it mygút nat a vaille
He went for to figút , nathelees
But he was slayn a noon , of Achilles
But thilke tale , is al to longö to telle
